top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE c.issued IS NOT NULL
  AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
  AND t.balance < 0
  AND a.frequency = 'monthly issuance';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE c.type = 'credit' 
  AND a.frequency = 'monthly issuance'
  AND a.account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM trans 
    WHERE type = 'withdrawal' AND operation = 'credit card withdrawal'
  )
  AND a.account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM trans 
    GROUP BY account_id 
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'withdrawal' AND operation = 'credit card withdrawal' THEN amount ...

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
  SELECT a.account_id
  FROM account a
  JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
  JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
  JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
  WHERE c.type = 'credit'
    AND a.frequency = 'monthly issuance'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND t.operation = 'credit card withdrawal'
  GROUP BY a.account_id
  HAVING SUM(t.amount) > 0
) credit_accounts
WHERE credit_accounts.account_id IN (
  SELECT account_id
  FROM trans
  GROUP BY account_id
 ...

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE c.issued IS NOT NULL
  AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
  AND t.balance < 0
  AND a.frequency = 'monthly issuance';
